User.title: User
User.description: Stores user settings, names, and relationship setup metadata.

userId.description: The unique Firebase authenticated user UID.

partner2.description: Display name of Partner 2 or dream crush.

relationshipDate.description: Relationship starting anniversary or crush date.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A single chat message exchange in the AI advisor module.

DiaryEntry.title: DiaryEntry
DiaryEntry.description: A personal notebook journal entry saved securely.

BondImage.title: BondImage
BondImage.description: An AI-generated relationship bond image visualizing current themes.

url.description: Stored image base64, data URI, or secure cloud asset url.

prompt.description: Prompt used to generate visual representations.

theme.description: Selected relationship or visual style context.

RelationshipInsights.title: RelationshipInsights
RelationshipInsights.description: A calculated/analyzed metric summarizing current romantic bond health and advice.

recentThemes.description: Extracted key themes of current interactions.

/users/{userId}.description: Owner user settings document containing user parameters.

/users/{userId}/chatHistory/{messageId}.description: Unbounded subcollection for user conversation memories.

/users/{userId}/diaryEntries/{entryId}.description: Unbounded subcollection storing personal diaries and notes.

/users/{userId}/bondImages/{imageId}.description: Unbounded subcollection of generated romantic canvases.

/users/{userId}/insights/latest.description: Latest generated counseling metrics and strategic resolution maps.
